2971902.title: SpongeBob
2971902.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2972003.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2972003.description: Felicity and Miguel rescue a prince named Denzel who's been imprisoned by his evil brother, Prince Larry. // When Felicity loses her favorite toy, she and her friends have to retrieve it from the yard of her dreaded neighbor, the Meanotaur.

2972059.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2972059.description: Felicity and Miguel attend a costume party at The Palace of the Perfect where they end up in a fight to take back some stolen powers. // Yana's invited to a fancy society event, but she's afraid she'll make a fool of herself.

2972128.title: Dorg van Dango
2972128.description: A jealous Dorg steal his sister's Jumpsy Boots, only to have a garbage truck pick them up and drive away! // Dorg and the gang cast a spell to cool things down during a heatwave.

2972857.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2972857.description: The Penguins set out to perform their own good deeds. But things don't work out as planned. // While Mort and Private stop to liberate Cheezy Bitz from the zoo vending machine they are both sucked in.

2972917.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2972917.description: It's game night and the penguins are playing hot potato with a live bomb. // According to the penguin's intel, the sewer rats are up to something BIG. They need an undercover operative. But who is rat-like enough to pull off such a mission? Mort.

2972983.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2972983.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

2973029.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2973029.description: Donatello and April investigate a scientist's disappearance, but discover a conspiracy regarding a bizarre psychic monkey instead.

2973827.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2973827.description: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

2973869.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2973869.description: Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

2973907.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2973907.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2973926.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2973926.description: During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for a real Tasmanian devil. The mixup creates problems all around, especially when Simon reads that the Tasmanian devil is scheduled for surgery. Can Dave and the boys rescue Alvin?!

2973956.title: SpongeBob
2973956.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2974006.title: SpongeBob
2974006.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2974793.title: SpongeBob
2974793.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2974823.title: SpongeBob
2974823.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2974896.title: SpongeBob
2974896.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2974963.title: SpongeBob
2974963.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2975769.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975769.description: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's, missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. And the only way to break the curse is to find Mister Whiskers.

2975799.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975799.description: When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty. But he quickly learns that parenting is a lot harder than he ever imagined.

2975834.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2975834.description: Dave is concerned that The Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. But when they challenge Dave to play the game before judging it, Dave becomes even more addicted than The Chipmunks.

2975879.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2975879.description: The rats have been terrorizing Roger the alligator. He asks the penguins for help. Their solution: swap Roger's brain with Rico's, and let the but kicking begin! / A robot is sent to the zoo to learn the habits of lemurs before it's sent into space.

2975964.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2975964.description: When the penguins bring Marlene with them on a sno-cone mission in the park, she can't handle the freedom of being outside the zoo walls. / Max the cat is on the run from evil animal control Officer X, and he comes to the penguins for help.

2976728.title: Hier is Pony
2976728.description: Pony's constant distractions threaten to derail Annie's part of a science project Gerry is counting on her to do. // On a trip to the bookstore, Annie and Pony discover the comfiest chair in the world that also may have superpowers.

2976810.title: SpongeBob
2976810.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2976894.title: SpongeBob
2976894.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2977698.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2977698.description: When Timmy gripes that being Mom is easier than being a kid, Wanda takes the bait and switches their brains. // Frustrated by his inability to catch fairies, Crocker turns his attention to hunting a new magical creature - leprechauns.

2977779.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2977779.description: After failing on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad's in his class!

2977804.title: The Loud House
2977804.description: After Lincoln gets a pink hand-me-down bike from Lori, he borrows Lynn's cool BMX bike without telling her. // Someone clogged the Loud House toilet and Lincoln sets out to find out whodunit.

2977874.title: Huize Herrie
2977874.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

2977922.title: De Casagrandes
2977922.description: When Ronnie Anne realizes that she's not up to date on all of the latest trends, she seeks help from Carlota. // Bobby struggles to find Sergio after wishing he would fly away and never come back.

2978683.title: De Casagrandes
2978683.description: Carlota worries that her family will embarrass her after her vlog is discovered by a famous musician. // Hector becomes Ronnie Anne and Carl's newest classmate after deciding to finish his schooling.

2978746.title: Breadwinners
2978746.description: After wracking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up into Diner Ducks to pay off their debt. // Things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread and swap bodies.

2978813.title: Breadwinners
2978813.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce become obsessed with winning a toy out of the new crane game that's been installed at Pumpers. / When Buhdeuce gets a bad haircut, he goes berserks, and now SwaySway has to calm his buddy down before he gets busted by Rambamboo.

2979312.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2979312.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2979372.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2979372.description: Weary of using his simple bo staff to fight the technologically advanced Kraang, Donatello creates Metalhead, a remote-controlled robot turtle, to fight in his place.

2979457.title: Dorg van Dango
2979457.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

2979531.title: Ollie's Pack
2979531.description: Ollie convinces Van Horne to play him in detention so he can chase down and pack a garbage-eating blob monster. // When Bernie gets accepted to a gifted school, the trio decides to pull a heist and lower his grades.

2980264.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2980264.description: The toy manufacturer of Rico's doll-girlfriend has upgraded their doll line with a voice chip. // When the penguins are photographed while in action and placed on the new zoo poster they have to stop the presses before the poster gets out.

2980348.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2980348.description: When the penguins are interrupted mid-operation by a nosey scientist, they leave the zoo in danger.

2980378.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2980378.description: Timmy wishes that his Mom could sell a house to anyone. // Someone's kidnapped Big Daddy! With the big mob boss missing, Wanda is called in to run the family business.

2980456.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2980456.description: Life would be better with an older brother. At least that's what Timmy believes. // It's just another boring day, so Timmy wishes everything in school was mixed up like a 'find it' puzzle book.

2981206.title: SpongeBob
2981206.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2981280.title: SpongeBob
2981280.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2981330.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2981330.description: Kowalski accidentally creates a living blob of jelly. But 'Jiggles' has a big appetite and starts stealing fruit from the animals. / When a new TV show starts keeping people from coming to the zoo, the animals worry they'll lose their home.

2982136.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
2982136.description: Captain Man must save Kid Danger from Drillfinger with the only tool he has: a motorized toilet. // Prepping for cheer tryouts, Piper tries out Captain Man's now-discontinued health program but when she turns into a beast the heroes must stop her.

2982195.title: De Casagrandes
2982195.description: The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties. // Carl gets lost in the city zoo after sneaking away from his family, in search of Keyon, the Komodo dragon.

2982281.title: Huize Herrie
2982281.description: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test. // Lincoln conspires with the rest of his sisters to overthrow Lori's tyranny as their "baby"sitter.

2982333.title: Huize Herrie
2982333.description: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job. But can he give up the perks that come along with it?

2983048.title: Hier is Pony
2983048.description: Pony becomes a video game master, but when their friends are in danger Annie and Pony need to use their gaming skills to save them. // When Pony thinks he turned into a unicorn, Annie uses him to raise money to save their sports court from closing.

2983090.title: Hier is Pony
2983090.description: Annie can avoid detention if she can heal the principal's dying plant, but the plan goes awry when Pony becomes attached to it. // Pony's half-baked plan causes Annie to lose one of her boots, which she desperately needs for a family photo!

2983168.title: SpongeBob
2983168.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2983244.title: Dorg van Dango
2983244.description: When Dorg accidentally shrinks his sister's Adventure Club sash, he must replace the badges. // Dorg wants a good scare, so Patronella fills his house with all the gang's secret fears. Dorg finds out he's more scare-able than he thought!

2983898.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2983898.description: When the Turtles sneak out against Splinter's wishes (to go to a movie with April), they battle Baxter Stockman, a deranged inventor in mechanical battle armor.

2983945.title: Breadwinners
2983945.description: After wracking up a huge bill at Pumpers, SwaySway and Buhdeuce level up into Diner Ducks to pay off their debt. // Things get awkward when the guys eat a loaf of Switcheroo Bread and swap bodies.

2984023.title: SpongeBob
2984023.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2984062.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2984062.description: Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him the skateboard he's always wanted. But, Theodore gets sidetracked by his sweet tooth and squanders all of Alvin's money on candy instead. Now Theodore is forced to make up an improbable story.

2984113.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2984113.description: In a rare moment of generosity, Alvin gives his beloved cap to a fan. But soon he's convinced his mojo was in his cap, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert.

2984834.title: The Loud House
2984834.description: The siblings turn to Lisa's genius to help them land a spot on 'Double Dare.' // After secretly reading Luna's diary, Leni and Lincoln become worried about the exploits their sister writes about.

2984893.title: Huize Herrie
2984893.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

2985010.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2985010.description: Timmy's tired of being the guinea pig when the fairies, anti-fairies and pixies compete to see 'who is the best magical creature in the universe?' He suggests a competition to determine once and for all who is best.
